title: Embrace Of The Void
description: This mod adds 2 different gems which can find in different chests. NightFall Gem can teleport gamers to their recored home at dusk. Bless gem can teleport gamers to a recorded position when the health is low. It will teleport randomly if there's no record.
body:
#### Intro:

This mod adds 2 different gems which can find in different chests. NightFall Gem can teleport gamers to their recored home at dusk. Bless gem can teleport gamers to a recorded position when the health is low. It will teleport randomly if there's no record.

You can record dimension information which means you can directly teleport to other dimensions.



#### How to get:

Obtained from treasure chests such as dungeons, shipwrecks, and some villages.

Get teleportation cores from amethyst clusters or amethyst buds, and then synthesize them according to the recipe


#### How to record a position:

sneak and right click gem.


#### How to use:

NightFall gem: hold it in main hand or offhand and wait for dusk.

Bless gem: hold it or put it in inventory and wait for danger.


#### Others:

It supports other mod dimensions as well.


#### Villager Alter

It used to summon villagers. Enabling it by putting a emerald block under it.
See gallery for the recipe.

-----------------------------------------------------

#### 介绍：

该模组增加了两个宝石，黄昏传送宝石可以在黄昏时传送玩家回记录的地点（需要手持宝石）。庇佑传送宝石则会在玩家低血量时传送回记录的坐标，如果没有记录则随机传送。

记录的坐标同时记录了维度信息，因此可以直接跨纬度传送。



#### 如何获取：

地牢、沉船、部分村庄等宝箱中获取。

从紫水晶簇或者紫水晶芽中获取传送核心，然后根据配方合成。

#### 如何使用：

黄昏宝石：主手或副手持有，然后等待黄昏降临。

庇佑宝石：放在手中或者物品栏中，等待残血。


#### 如何记录坐标：

潜行并右键宝石。



#### 其他：

这两个宝石支持记录并传送至其他模组的维度。

#### 村民祭坛
用以召唤村民。在其下方放置一个绿宝石块以启用它。
合成配方见图库。
